products.title: CHEETOS® Crunchy Cheese Flavored Snacks
products.body_html: CHEETOS® Crunchy Cheese's made with real cheese for maximum flavor, deliciousness and crunchiness. Treat your tastebuds.

products.title: CHEEZ-IT® Original Snack Crackers 595g
products.body_html: The original iconic Cheez-It® flavor, the square shape, the rigid edges and that hole in the middle – everything about this baked snack cracker is the real deal, especially the cheese.

products.title: CHIPS AHOY! Original Chocolate Chip Cookies
products.body_html: The very same CHIPS AHOY! cookies you know and love, baked to have the perfect amount of crunch. These crispy chocolate chip cookies are loaded with lots of real chocolate chips.

products.title: Club® Original Crackers 388g
products.body_html: Flaky, buttery, lightly salted crackers that absolutely melt in your mouth.

products.title: Doritos® Nacho Cheese Flavored Tortilla Chips 262g
products.body_html: The original DORITOS® flavor.  This is the true classic.Enjoy the bold cheesy seasoning that's off the charts, Nacho Cheese will never let you down at snack time!

products.title: EXTRA Spearmint Sugarfree Chewing Gum, Multipack (3 Packs)
products.body_html: Fresh chewing gum guaranteed to give you a minty burst of confidence.

products.title: Fleñjure Bag Packs
products.body_html:
Indulge in the ultimate protection and sophistication for your most treasured consumables with our Flenjure Snack Packs. 

Crafted from renewable materials, each bag is a eco friendly smell-proof masterpiece designed to keep your belongings secure and beautifully displayed in the viewing window. From grabba to small edibles, our bags offer the perfect home for every precious item in your collection.

products.title: Fleñjure Cali Rolling Papers
products.body_html: Flenjure Cali rolling papers are designed for all smokers. It's designed for a smoother pull and burns slower. Our papers are made of highest quality vegan fibers and non toxic Arabic gum so you may enjoy your vibe as naturally as possible.

products.title: Fleñjure OG Jersey
products.body_html: OG Fleñjure Soccer/Football Jersey. Put that shit on.

products.title: Fruit by the Foot 128g (6 Rolls)
products.body_html: Each tasty fruit strip packs a whole lot of berry fruit flavor and is rolled into a coil to create an exotic treat unlike none!

products.title: FRUIT ROLL-UPS™ Original 10 Pack 141g
products.body_html: Fruit Roll-Ups are available in wild flavors and colors so the possibilities for fun are endless and fun goes on and on.

products.title: GUSHERS™ Tropical Fruit Snacks 136g
products.body_html: Gushers Fruit Flavored Snacks are bursting with fun. Gushers have a juicy center that bursts open with yummy liquid. Enjoy in tropical flavors.

products.title: HERSHEY'S Chocolate Syrup
products.body_html: The classic taste of HERSHEY’S Syrup. Use this easy squeeze bottle to create cold glasses of chocolate milk, chocolate floats, chocolate sundaes, rich hot cocoa and more!

products.title: Kettle Brand Sea Salt & Vinegar Potato Chips 212g
products.body_html: Kettle Brand Sea Salt & Vinegar Potato Chips are tangy AF. Thick and boldly flavored every bite will make your eyes water tears of vinegar-loving joy.

products.title: KOOL-AID Summer Blast Tropical Punch 538g
products.body_html: Quench your thirst with the refreshingly sweet taste of Kool Aid Sugar Sweetened Tropical Punch Artificially Flavored Powdered Drink Mix. Tropical punch powdered drink mix makes it easy to prepare a fruity beverage anywhere, by just mixing Kool Aid with water.

products.title: LAY'S® Classic Potato Chips
products.body_html: Farm-grown potatoes, cooked and seasoned to perfection. So every LAY'S® potato chip is perfectly crispy and full of fresh potato taste.

products.title: LIFE SAVERS 5 Flavors Gummies Bag, 7 oz
products.body_html: Do you enjoy the classic combination of cherry, watermelon, green apple, strawberry, and orange flavor treats we enjoyed growing up? Or are you a bit wilder? Have big berry flavor all year long with strawberry, red raspberry, blackberry, black raspberry, white grape, and cherry berry flavor then! LIFE SAVERS Gummies are made to release that inner child!

products.title: Little Bites® Blueberry Muffins 234g
products.body_html: Little Bites® Blueberry Muffins are baked beyond delicious. These tasty little golden mini muffins are made with real blueberries.

products.title: Little Debbies® Oatmeal Creme Pies 459g
products.body_html: Oatmeal Creme Pies are made from whole grain oats, molasses, and irresistible creme filling combined to create this classic treat.

products.title: M&M's® Peanut Milk Chocolate Candies 285g
products.body_html: Enjoy the classic roasted peanuts covered in real milk chocolate and a colorful candy shell.

products.title: Nesquik® Chocolate Flavored Powder 20.1 oz. Cannister
products.body_html: • NESQUIK ® Chocolate Flavored Powder turns your favorite milk (or water) into an irresistibe, delicious and nutritious drink!

products.title: Oreo Original Chocolate Sandwich Cookies 513g
products.body_html: Oreo Chocolate Sandwich Cookies are filled with the world renown OREO creme between two chocolate wafers, making them supremely dunkable and delicious. Bon appetit.

products.title: Pop-Tarts® 384g
products.body_html: Pop-Tarts® offers a wide variety of delicious toaster pastries for anyone looking to enjoy a tasty treat. Pick your favorite flavor and treat your taste buds.

products.title: Pringles® Lightly Salted Crisps 149g
products.body_html: Pringles® Lightly Salted Crisps capture the potato flavor you love with just a hint of salt, so now feeling good can also taste great.

products.title: REESE'S® Milk Chocolate Peanut Butter Cups 8 Pack 124g
products.body_html: Taste the smooth milk chocolate, creamy peanut butter in a perfect balance of salty and sweet, crunchy and smooth greatness.

products.title: SKITTLES Original 442g
products.body_html: Every bag of SKITTLES Original Fruity Candy is filled with classic fruity flavors. Share the rainbow.

products.title: Sour Patch Kids 226g
products.body_html: The chewy candy is a wholly delicious sweet treat that's SOUR. SWEET. GONE. Each bag contains sour candies in signature assorted fruit flavors that create a SOUR THEN SWEET treat to satisfy your taste buds!

products.title: STARBURST Original Fruit Chews Candy 15.6 oz
products.body_html: Enjoy the individually wrapped chewy fruit flavored squares you know and love in each STARBURST Original Fruit Chew candy.

products.title: Twizzlers
products.body_html: TWIZZLERS Candy has something for every fruity-chewy candy lover. It’s the twist you can’t resist.

products.title: Welch's® Fruit Snacks 2lb - 40 pack (0.8oz Pouches)
products.body_html: Welch’s® Fruit Snacks are made with real fruit and feature an excellent source of Vitamins A, C & E, and are Gluten Free The Mixed Fruit variety is America’s Favorite Fruit Snacks®

products.title: Werther's® Original Chewy Caramels 307g
products.body_html: Werther's® Original Chewy Caramels are smooth, rich and creamy caramels handcrafted from the finest ingredients made to melt in your mouth every time.
